title: BioShock Content
description: A mod that adds content from the BioShock series
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962383431038292058/1155625640108769370/logo_3.png)

BioShock Content is a mod that adds content from the BioShock series made by 2K Games.

 
Currently, it adds:

3 new weapons (Plasmid Glove, Wrench, and Pistol. Pistol comes with upgrades)

3 new structures

2 new mobs

Notably, it currently features 4 Plasmids, 2 of which can be upgraded. You can access these via finding the bottles in structures and drinking them, then using the Gene Bank to equip them.
 

This mod plans to add a fair bit of content from the BioShock series, especially weapons (including plasmids) and enemies, and potentially some original or heavily-reworked content

If you wish to include this mod in a modpack, please give credit.

 

This mod is not associated with 2K Games, and is entirely a fan-made project that makes no money.
